title: JOYARCH 1/64 Scale Desktop RC Drift Car for Adult, 2.4G Full Proportional Remote Control Sports Car, 4WD Mini RC Racing Cars with LED Light
features: ✨【High Quality Material】Made of high-strength PVC shell and ABS base, which makes the racer more sturdy and durable, and enhances its anti-collision ability.

🚗【Exquisite Appearance】Exquisite appearance and compact size (7.8 x 3.5 x 2.5 cm). With cool LED light design, increasing the excitement of driving at night and improving visibility. Easy to carry and comes with accessories such as barricade barrels to enrich the game.

🎮【Precise Control】Equipped with a 2.4GHz remote controller with proportional throttle and steering control, players can adjust the speed and direction through the controller, which can be wirelessly controlled within a range of 30 metres, and the speed can be up to 15KM/H, which makes the operation more stable.

🔋【Battery Life】Equipped with 3.7V 100mAh battery fully charged can make the racing car last up to 20 minutes. It is also equipped with a dedicated USB charger to ensure faster and more convenient charging.

🎁【Best Gift】It is the best gift for racing enthusiasts, the model can not only be used as a collectors item, but also as a toy to bring a unique gaming experience, giving you the experience of a different kind of driving fun.
description: Detail Description Item Number: FQD23/FQD25 Product Name: 1:64 4WD Drift Car Product Material: Plastic Product Color: FQD23: Pink/Blue; FQD25: Ivory White/Black Product Speed: 15 km/h Product Battery: 3.7V 100mAh (Built-in Battery) Remote Control Battery: 2×“AA” (purchased separately) Charging Method: USB Charging Cable Remote Control Time: 20 minutes Charging Time: 25 minutes Remote Control Distance: 25–30 meters Motor: 612 Hollow Cup Strong-Magnetic Motor 3.7V 100mAh Battery Weight: 2.6g Single Unit Weight (Including Battery): 0.024 Kg Single Unit Packaging Weight (Including Color Box): 0.3 Kg Product Specification: 7.8×3.5×2.5 cm Color Box Specification: 25.5×17.5×7 cm Package Including 1:64 4WD Drift Car ×1 Remote Control ×1 Roadblock Barrels ×4 English Instruction Manual ×1 Charging Cable ×1
